content.en:
"The energy is abundant, and there must be a lot of resources!"

Ye Tian muttered.

But soon, he discovered that there were many native creatures here, and it was indeed strange that the dragon tribe had not exterminated the native creatures here.

Of course, he didn't discuss these things, he just wanted to gather more resources to improve his strength.

"Dragon vine grass, a good thing, it is of great help to the king-level promotion and cultivation, but it has little effect on me, it can only be used as an ordinary resource!"

Ye Tian looked at the dragon vine grass in front of him and muttered.

Of course, there are a lot of dragon vine grasses here, and the total value is not low, so if the patriarch Crane Shadow comes, he will definitely be very excited.

And under these dragon vine grasses, there is a king-level extreme creature hidden, and there is a faint ancient demon-level bloodline aura on its body.

Of course, this Ancient Demon-level bloodline-level qi and blood are too weak, and I don't know how many generations later, it is a descendant of an Ancient Demon-level creature, and it is more powerful than ordinary creatures of the same level.

Wow!

Ye Tianyi stretched out his hand and pulled out these dragon vine 04 one by one, and this movement naturally made this king-level creature wake up.

Rumble!!!!

A terrifying dragon-like creature drilled out and attacked Ye Tian, even the ultimate particles around him rioted.

However.

Ye Tian only pressed one hand on the dragon-shaped creature's body, and the ultimate arcane broke through the void and launched.

In an instant, the body of this king-level creature was pierced, and it was instantly fated on the spot.

"It's too weak!"

Ye Tian commented.

When he had taken all the dragon vine grass, he left the place.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian walked around the Dragon Swallow Pond, found a lot of resources, and also met other members of the Dragon Disciple Tribe, but these members did not suspect his identity.

However, the resources he obtains are all ordinary resources, and in order to obtain them, he kills many native creatures.

this day.

Ye Tian seemed to sense that something was wrong, and immediately transferred the resources and took them out by another copy body.

Really.

Ye Tian was in trouble, and the top powerful emperor-level creature of the head priest division, the Sky Swallowing Demon Dragon, appeared.

"Arrowmu's Blade!"

Ye Tian slashed this blow with this ordinary copy body, but this ordinary copy body was too weak, and when he used this move, his own injuries were naturally not light.

And the point is that this blow didn't destroy a single piece of the Sky Devouring Demon Dragon's scales, just like tofu hitting the steel, and it directly collapsed.

Followed by.

This Sky Devouring Demon Dragon killed Ye Tian's duplicate body with a single claw.

......

"Such a powerful Heaven Devouring Demon Dragon, far more powerful than an emperor-level existence like He Lao, it is definitely a top-level emperor-level existence. "

"It's strange, how could such an emperor-level existence suddenly appear, and it was like aiming at me, killing me directly!"

Ye Tian was very puzzled.

After that, he sent a replica body, which was also a replica of a king-level of the Dragonfall tribe.

Then, he entered the Dragon Swallow Pond again.

As a result, after a period of time, he was targeted by the Sky Devouring Demon Dragon again, and he was killed in seconds.

Killed twice, he finally had a guess.

"Could it be that I killed too many native creatures, so I was targeted by the Sky Devouring Demon Dragon?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

This possibility is extremely high, why are there still so many native creatures alive, that is, the dragon tribe knows that these native creatures can't be killed, otherwise the Sky Devouring Demon Dragon will kill it, and even the dragon tribe will have a headache.

In the case of being suppressed by the Dragon Swallowing Pond, even if the top emperor-level members of the Dragon Disciple Tribe make a move, they may not be able to kill the Sky Devouring Demon Dragon, and even if they do, maybe they will have to kill a few powerful emperor-level existences.

In that case, it's not worth it.

And after killing the Sky Devouring Demon Dragon, are you sure that there are no other top-level emperor-level creatures?

This may be the reason why the Dragon Disciple Tribe has not completely occupied the interior of the Dragon Swallow Pond so far, it is really dangerous inside, and there is no way to completely occupy it.

Ye Tian copied the identity of a king-level again, this time he didn't kill those native creatures, but only severely damaged or knocked them away.

Sure enough, after a period of time, he was still not targeted by the Sky Swallowing Demon Dragon.

At this moment, he was sure that the native creatures in the Dragon Swallowing Pool could not be killed, otherwise it would cause trouble.

......

Time passed, and Ye Tian obtained a lot of resources from Long Tun Tan, but he often encountered danger and killed directly.

He doesn't kill the native creatures, but sometimes he encounters powerful native creatures and he doesn't have time to escape, so he is killed.

These ordinary replica bodies are too weak, and their ability to save their lives is naturally weak.

But Ye Tian didn't care, as long as he could get resources, it didn't matter how many times he died, he copied his body.

this day.

Ye Tian's copy body went deep into the Dragon Swallowing Pond, and the closer he got to the depths, the more he sensed the aura of danger.

"That's ......"

Ye Tian sensed one after another Heaven Devouring Demon Dragons, there were eight in total, all of them were top emperor-level levels.

And these eight Heaven Devouring Demon Dragons were all prostrate there, and in the middle of their arch guards, there was a towering giant mountain.

And this giant mountain is not really a giant mountain, but a terrifying creature.

"That's an ancient demon-level Sky Devouring Demon Dragon, it seems to be dead, no, it's not dead, it still seems to be breathing, it should be sleeping!"

"The wisp of breath leaked by this Sky Devouring Demon Dragon is terrifying, it is definitely a top ancient demon level, and it may even be a peak ancient demon level 070!"

Ye Tian guessed.

If it is the peak ancient demon level, it will be too terrifying, and the Golden God Department may not be able to deal with it.

But why is there an ancient demon-level Sky Devouring Demon Dragon sleeping here? And the news hasn't spread yet, it should be that the Dragon Disciple Tribe deliberately concealed this news.

"He Lao shouldn't know the situation here, otherwise he wouldn't have suggested that I come here, and I haven't revealed specific information yet!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Rumble!!!

The eight Heaven Devouring Demon Dragons locked on Ye Tian in unison, and with the next breath, Ye Tian's duplicate body was wiped out.

......

Somewhere in Longtuntan.

An emperor of the Dragon Disciple Tribe frowned and said, "Who the hell is it that has angered the Heaven Devouring Demon Dragon several times?"

He wasn't worried about angering the Sky Swallowing Demon Dragon, but if he let that Ancient Demon-level Sky Swallowing Demon Dragon wake up, it would be troublesome.

Although the patriarch said that the chance of the ancient demon-level Heaven Devouring Demon Dragon awakening was less than 1 in 10,000, I was afraid that some emperor-level would deliberately let it awaken.

It's just that the Sky Devouring Demon Dragon is thirsty for killing, there shouldn't be any emperor so stupid, right?

Besides, the information here is well concealed, and many emperors don't know about the situation here, and even if they do, they won't deliberately come to trouble the Sky Devouring Demon Dragon!

This time, he could only think that a few unwitting fools had killed too many native creatures, but they should be dead.
